prompt: I'm building a voice agent for a dental office using LiveKit and AssemblyAI. Patients will be calling to schedule appointments and I need it to accurately capture names, procedure types, and dates. Can you set up the STT pipeline?

assertions.text: Uses u3-rt-pro model (not older streaming models)
Sets max_turn_silence explicitly (not relying on LiveKit default of 100ms)
Does not use deprecated word_boost parameter
